english translation text: Dua 3
Recite the below 10 times:

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا دَائِمَ ٱلْفَضْلِ عَلَىٰ ٱلْبَريِّةِ،يَا بَاسِطَ ٱلْيَدَيْنِ بِٱلْعَطِيَّةِ
english translation text:
O He Who is ever-Favourer on the beings!
O He Who is openhandedly Bestower of gifts!

arabic text: يَا صَاحِبَ ٱلْمَوَاهِبِ ٱلسَّنِيَّةِ،صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمِّدٍ وَآلِهِ
english translation text:
O He Who is the Giver of sublime donations!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,

arabic text: خَيْرِ ٱلْوَرَىٰ سَجِيَّةً،وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا يَا ذَٱ ٱلْعُلَىٰ،فِي هٰذِهِ ٱلْعَشِيَّةِ
english translation text:
the best of all creatures in traits, and forgive us,
O Lord of Highness at this evening.

arabic text: يَا دَائِمَ ٱلْفَضْلِ عَلَىٰ ٱلْبَريِّةِ،يَا بَاسِطَ ٱلْيَدَيْنِ بِٱلْعَطِيَّةِ
